title: EnderRat
description: This resource pack replaces the endermite mob with 4 different rat variants.
body:
Why would anyone want to replace the endermite mob with a rat? I don't know but I made it!

The rats have 4 different colored variants:
Grey, black, brown, and rare albino.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

***OPTIFINE IS REQUIRED FOR THIS PACK TO WORK***


#### More

Note that the rats are a little buggy in their movement, I do not know how to fix it.

The variants might differ to other players.

The rat textures are slightly inspired by Rats Mischief, but other than that I came up with this idea on my own.




#### TERMS OF USE

Do NOT upload this to any other site and/or claim this as your own.

Do NOT take and use the textures/model for your own project.
